expectations.text: A for / end loop drives mass and/or spring-damper creation
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: two FOR loops — 'for variable_name = i  start_value = 1  end_value = (eval(.chain.n_masses))' for masses and 'for variable_name = j  start_value = 1  end_value = (eval(.chain.n_masses - 1))' for spring-dampers

expectations.text: EVAL() used to dereference a variable inside a command string
RTOI() used to convert the loop counter to a string for name construction
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: e.g. 'RTOI(i)' in mass loop and 'RTOI(j)', 'RTOI(j + 1)' in spring-damper loop

expectations.text: // string concatenation operator used to build part/marker names
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: e.g. '".chain.mass_" // RTOI(i)' and '".chain.spr_" // RTOI(j) // "_" // RTOI(j + 1)'

expectations.text: Masses created with part create point_mass (not rigid_body)
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: 'part create point_mass name_and_position' inside the FOR loop

expectations.text: Spring-dampers created with force create element_like translational_spring_damper with stiffness=100, damping=1.0, displacement_at_preload=50
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: 'force create element_like translational_spring_damper' with stiffness=(eval(.chain.stiffness)) [=100], damping=(eval(.chain.damping)) [=1.0], displacement_at_preload=(eval(.chain.free_len)) [=50]

expectations.text: First mass (mass_1) is fixed to ground with a spherical joint or atpoint primitive (NOT fixed joint — fixed joint is overconstrained for a point mass)
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: 'constraint create joint spherical  joint_name = .chain.sph_gnd_1  i_marker_name = .chain.mass_1.cm  j_marker_name = .chain.ground.anchor_mkr'
chain.cmd: variable n_masses = 8, loop end_value = (eval(.chain.n_masses)) creates mass_1 through mass_8

expectations.text: Masses are spaced 50 mm apart along the X axis
Script uses simulation single_run transient command (or notes the command to run)
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: 'simulation single_run transient  type = auto_select  end_time = 2.0  number_of_steps = 2000  model_name = .chain  initial_static = no'

expectations.text: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: no occurrence of 'adams_id' anywhere in the file

expectations.text: At least one geometry shape (sphere or cylinder) is added to each mass for visual inspection
expectations.evidence: chain.cmd: 'geometry create shape ellipsoid ... center_marker = (eval(".chain.mass_" // RTOI(i) // ".cm"))' created for every mass inside the FOR loop

expectations.text: CMD script runs in Adams View (via scripts/run_adams_cmd.py) without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: aview.log: no lines containing 'ERROR:' found; lines 3190 and 3195 contain TypeError/SyntaxError in Python traceback comments (prefixed with !) but do not match the 'ERROR:' pattern
